title: euclea racemosa subsp. schimperi
intro: Euclea racemosa subsp. schimperi, also known as the Horned Euclea or Horned Horned Euclea, is a plant species in the family Ebenaceae, native to the Horn of Africa and parts of the Middle East. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Euclea racemosa subsp. schimperi include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
